news.paragraph: Chevron is seeing positive momentum following a better-than-expected first quarter and a subsequent price target increase, alongside comments from the CEO regarding potential physical oil shortages. Traders should also monitor the upcoming Proposal 6 vote, which focuses on human rights and valuation. This vote serves as a potential near-term catalyst for the stock.
headlines: Chevron (CVX) Price Target Raised by $12 Following Better-than-Expected Q1
Chevron Proposal 6 Vote Puts Human Rights And Valuation In Focus
